name: Tiếng Việt
description:
Đây là bản dịch sang tiếng Việt được
<color=#00FFFF>Daenry</color> (@entervn). Bản dịch có thể có thiếu sót hoặc sai sót. (Bản này dùng để so sánh và đóng góp đợt 1 trên 8 - phần Other)

main.bandagedsc: A roll of dressing with a bandage, used to slow down bleeding, stabilize fractures and aid skin healing. Has no effect on muscle health.
main.rippeddressingdsc: A small pile of ripped clothing. Can be used as a makeshift bandage for bleeding wounds.
main.ragdsc: A worn, crumpled up rag. Can be used as decent makeshift dressing. Use in the inventory to dry yourself.
main.analgesicgauzedsc: Woven gauze made of cotton, containing analgesic drugs. Decent at slowing bleeding and reducing pain from injuries.
main.alginatedsc: Dressing derived from carbohydrate sources released by clinical bacterial species, in the same manner as biofilm formation. Slows bleeding, highly improves skin healing and counteracts infections
main.sterilizedbandagedsc: A roll of dressing with a bandage, used to slow down bleeding, stabilize fractures and aid skin healing. Counteracts infections. Has no effect on muscle health.
main.plasticbandagedsc: A roll of specially synthesized tough material, made to efficiently cover wounds and stabilize fractures. Has no effect on muscle health.
main.adhesivebandagedsc: A pack of small medical dressings, made to treat small injuries. Lowers bleeding.
main.musharmdsc: Inedible plant part, useful as a one-time makeshift bandage. Can be used as foliage for crafing.
main.paincreamdsc: A small 100ml bottle used to hold relief cream. Dosage is 10ml.
main.morphinedsc: A 100ml syringe that can inject fluid intravenously. The overdose label reads 88ml.
main.makeshiftlrddsc: A makeshift Localized Resuscitation Device. Looks like it's taped together. Increases the muscle health and disinfects limb it's used on, AND any directly adjacent limbs. Slightly reduces internal bleeding if used on the chest. Requires at least 25mL of LRD serum to function.
main.lrddsc: A Localized Resuscitation Device, made to easily provide effective general trauma care. Increases limb health, slows bleeding, provides pain relieving drugs and disinfects the limb it's used on, along with any adjacent limbs. Highly reduces internal bleeding if used on the chest. Requires at least 25mL of LRD serum to function.
main.opiumdsc: A 100ml syringe that can inject fluid intravenously. The overdose label says 200ml.
main.heroindsc: A 150ml syringe that can inject fluid intravenously. This one is missing the graduation marks and dosage guides.
main.naloxonedsc: A 100ml syringe that can inject fluid intravenously. You can't make out the brand's name other than the "N".
main.sodiumnitroprussidedsc: A 100ml bottle with sodium nitroprusside. As the medication only works intravenously, you will need to get a separate syringe to fill and use.
main.vasopressindsc: A 100ml bottle with vasopressin. As the medication only works intravenously, you will need to get a separate syringe to fill and use.
main.amiodaronedsc: A 100ml bottle with amiodarone. As the medication only works intravenously, you will need to get a separate syringe to fill and use.
main.fentanyldsc: A 100ml syringe that can inject fluid intravenously. This one comes with diluted fentanyl for pain relief. The overdose label reads 20ml.
main.autopumpdsc: While worn, pumps blood in place of your heart using a simple mechanism and an internal battery, keeping your blood pressure at livable levels. Might buy you more time to fix whatever catastrophe has befallen you.
main.aeddsc: An electronic device that diagnoses life-threatening cardiac arrhythmias and treats them via electric shocks. Use on the upper torso. Compared to a manual defibrillator, it does not require training, but takes longer to work and uses more power.
main.manualdefibrillatordsc: An electronic device used to stabilize dangerous heart rhythms. Use on the upper torso. This one is manual, and will require some know-how to use correctly. Compared to an AED, it's faster and uses less power, but isn't guaranteed to work. Higher INT makes operation easier.
main.antidepressantsdsc: A 140ml pill bottle of antidepressants. Dosage is 20ml.
main.antibioticsdsc: A 100ml pill bottle of antibiotic pills. Dosage is 20ml.
main.antiserumdsc: A 100ml syringe with an autoinjector at the end. Dosage is 50ml.
main.antiraddsc: A 100ml pill bottle with a cool radiation sign on it. Dosage is 20ml.
main.sleepingpillsdsc: A blister pack containing 25ml worth of pills. Dosage is 5ml. The brand name is missing.
main.rosepoddsc: A part of a sand rose. Doesn't spoil. Can be opened.
main.roselightdsc: A bright, far reaching yellow light that came from a sand rose. While it decays fast, it's useful for checking how big a drop is. Also reveals hidden infections if used on a limb.
main.splintdsc: A sturdy board, made to aid fractures. Helps with healing fractures and dislocations. Putting it on a functional limb will still immobilize it, reducing your capabilities.
main.bloodbagdsc: A 0.75L plastic bag with an autoinjector at the end. Injects 375mL on use. Use in the inventory to draw blood from yourself.
main.bloodsacdsc: A small, fleshy sac with blood in it. Doesn't look too different from your blood. Can be eaten or used in crafting.
main.venomglanddsc: A tiny salivary gland that produces and stores hemotoxin. You could probably process it into some kind of anti-venom.
main.salinedsc: A 0.75L bag with a needle at the end, for injecting fluids intravenously.
main.ringersolutiondsc: A 0.7L bag with a needle at the end, for injecting fluids intravenously.
main.bloodbaghumandsc: A 0.75L plastic bag with an autoinjector at the end. Injects 375mL on use. Use in the inventory to draw blood from yourself. There's traces of red on it.
main.flammablepowderdsc: A chalky and highly flammable powder. Useful in making explosives.
main.foliagebagdsc: A very flimsy bag made of tied together foliage.
main.slingbagdsc: A foliage bag with added reinforcements, made to be worn on your back.
main.gravbagdsc: A very experimental container that generates negative gravity in order to reduce the weight of whatever's in it. Has explosive tendencies when its battery nears empty.
main.legpouchdsc: A leather pouch with straps made to go around the thigh. It's like a pocket pocket!
main.liquidpouchdsc: A flexible liquid pouch made to store liquids. Has a strap to go over your belly. You can fill it with bottles and vice-versa.
main.materialpouchdsc: A large, sturdy pouch that attaches to your thigh, with many small pockets to hold crafting materials. Has a high encumbrance reduction, but only accepts very small items.
main.pursedsc: A handheld medium-sized bag used to carry personal items. Quite stylish!
main.pouchdsc: A small green bag made of woven synthetic fiber. Has no handle.
main.brokenbagdsc: An old, heavily worn school bag. The straps are torn and unusable, rendering the bag unwearable.
main.toolboxdsc: A big, heavy steel box, made to hold tools.
main.medkitdsc: A small box which can efficiently hold various medicines.
main.scaffoldingpackdsc: A hyper-compressed box of scaffolding, made to be easily placed down. Lasts 100 uses.
main.disinfectantdsc: A 0.2L plastic bottle with a spray nozzle on it. Can spray 10ml of liquid at a time.
main.spraybottledsc: A 0.2L bottle with a spray nozzle on it. Sprays 10ml of liquid at a time. Good for correct use of antiseptics.
main.syringedsc: A 100ml syringe which can inject fluid intravenously. It's handmade.
main.scrapmetaldsc: Bits and pieces of steel from destroyed machinery. Can be placed down if above 25% condition. Commonly used as currency between survivors, and for crafting.
main.climbingropedsc: A long, strengthened sheet of rope with attachment points at each end. You could place it over a large drop and use it to climb down. Has two uses.
main.circuitboarddsc: A bit of circuitry, ripped out of a once working machine. It still sparks occasionally. Used in crafting.
main.bloodcrystalsharddsc: Seeps blood into anything it touches. Slowly increases your blood volume up to normal levels while stored on your body.
main.soothingcrystalsharddsc: It has a calming aura to it. Slowly increases happiness while stored on your body.
main.reliefcrystalsharddsc: You feel a little numb holding it... Decreases pain while stored on your body.
main.turbulentcrystalsharddsc: It vibrates with energy. Increases jump height while stored on your body.
main.oxygencrystalsharddsc: It's bubbling away slowly, releasing oxygen into anything around it... Increases stamina regeneration while stored on your body.
main.emissivecrystalsharddsc: Glows brightly, for a time. Useful as a light source while it lasts.
main.digestioncrystalsharddsc: It feels as if it's taking matter out of your body... Decreases sickness while stored on your body.
main.geofruitdsc: Basic, but tasty fruit. Grows on geo-trees. Low in calories, reduces some thirst and decays fast.
main.stonefruitcloseddsc: A hard green fruit stuck to a hard, gray part of its plant. You need to separate it using your teeth first.
main.stonefruitopendsc: A hard green fruit with a neutral taste and medium fat content. It's very dry, you'll probably be thirsty after it.
main.bananadsc: A tasty yellow fruit, seemingly from another planet. Slightly radioactive.
main.burgerdsc: A big, tasty snack. Fills both your tummy and soul!
main.pancakedsc: A layered flat, sweet batter cooked on a hot surface, covered in syrup. Might get into your fur. Tasty!
main.pizzaslicedsc: A slice of baked pizza. Very tasty, filling and fattening!
main.bucketofchickendsc: A bunch of chicken legs in a bucket. Very filling. Has an exceedingly long shelf life.
main.steakdsc: A big, nicely cooked and prepared piece of meat. Filling, fattening and tasty!
main.cookiesdsc: A pack of small, baked sweet snacks. Tasty, but not the healthiest.
main.chipsdsc: A pack of thin, baked slices of potato. Tasty, but not the healthiest.
main.cerealdsc: A box of generic cereal. Not exactly fun to eat dry, but it's filling and not repulsive. Slightly increases thirst.
main.bowlofcerealdsc: A foliage bowl that can hold 0.5L of liquid. Somehow, you're unable to create it without the cereal.
main.makeshifthelmetdsc: A rudimentary helmet made out of some rope and stitched together carcasses. Provides some head protection.
main.hardcandydsc: A pack of small, hard candy. Tasty, but not filling.
main.fleshchunkdsc: A giant, very fatty chunk of flesh. Must've came from something big. Very filling and fattening.
main.candybardsc: A nice, tasty candy bar. Lasts long, but not very filling. Might make you sick if overeaten.
main.chocolatebardsc: A bar of unpackaged chocolate. Tasty, but you can't digest it well.
main.waterbottledsc: A 0.5L plastic bottle. Comes with clean water.
main.milkdsc: A carton that can hold a liter of liquid.
main.chocolatemilkdsc: A large plastic bottle that holds up to a liter of liquid.
main.bleachdsc: A 1.5L plastic bottle, made to hold bleach.
main.energydrinkdsc: A 0.25L soda can with bright markings on it.
main.coffeedsc: A paper cup that can hold 0.25L of liquid.
main.soupdsc: A small closed bowl that can hold 0.3L of liquid.
main.applejuicedsc: A carton that can hold 0.8L of liquid. Feels... natural.
main.lemonadedsc: A jar that can hold 0.75L of liquid. Surprisingly tough.
main.iceteadsc: A 0.5L bottle. This one has an orange tint to it.
main.alcoholdsc: Glass bottle that can hold 0.4L of liquid.
main.exposedcoredsc: The dormant remains of something once animated. You could probably eat it to absorb its energy in the form of nutrients and water. It looks like it's slowly morphing into something...
main.foliagedsc: Generic alien plant life. Barely edible, with a dissatisfying taste. Might make you sick. Decays fast. Often used in crafting.
main.foliagemealdsc: A decent prepared food, made of crispy foliage and rudimentary filling. Won't last for long and has no fat, but it's very filling.
main.dryfoliagedsc: Seems slightly more appealing to consume when it's dry. Might make you a little sick.
main.glowplantfruitdsc: Bioluminescent and inedible. Has moderately dangerous toxins inside; counteracts infections. Its juice promotes chemical reactions, making it useful in crafting.
main.flashlightdsc: Lights up a large area in front of it, but slowly loses battery. Use to change mode.
main.emergencylightdsc: A tiny, one-time use emergency flashlight. You'll probably want to find a new source of light before it runs out. Use to toggle.
main.lanterndsc: A simple, wood and glass lantern with a bright yellow crystal inside of it.
main.lightbulbdsc: An electric light with a filament that is heated until it glows. Seems to be battery powered. Don't put it in your mouth.
main.nutrientbardsc: Solid, edible bar of pure nutrients and calories. Neutral taste, and doesn't spoil.
main.primitivediggingtooldsc: A piece of sharp, heavy metal on a stick. Better at digging than claws.
main.makeshiftdiggingtooldsc: A piece of thrown together and tied up metal, made for digging through rock. It's a bit flimsy.
main.makeshiftheadlampdsc: It's just a glowplant fruit strapped to your forehead. Not exactly comfortable, but frees up some inventory space.
main.shoveldsc: A tool specially crafted to efficiently displace soil and other loose materials. While you haven't seen one of these before in your life, using it isn't exactly a science.
main.woodshoveldsc: A tool specially crafted to efficiently displace soil and other loose materials. Made with a brittle, yet light material.
main.pitchforkdsc: An agricultural tool used to pitch loose material, such as hay, straw, manure, or leaves. Made of steel.
main.woodpitchforkdsc: An agricultural tool used to pitch loose material, such as hay, straw, manure, or leaves. Made of wood.
main.minilaserdrilldsc: A small, consumer-grade laser drill. Not the best at digging, but uses no stamina.
main.heavydrilldsc: A big, heavy, mechanical handheld drill. Very efficient, though lacks range.
main.pickaxedsc: A tool specially crafted to dig rock. Very efficient at removing terrain, though slow.
main.titaniumpickaxedsc: A finely crafted tool, made out of forged titanium. Very durable and efficient at removing terrain, though not very combat capable.
main.titaniummultitooldsc:
A small, yet very firm and durable tool used for crafting, with a heavy hammer top and a tiny yet razor sharp blade hidden in the handle. While not useful for digging nor combat, it will last nigh indefinitely for all sorts of crafting recipes, and is light.

<color="red">Can be used in the health panel to amputate severely infected limbs.
main.titaniummachetedsc:
A very capable and durable tool for combat, both easy and light to swing, yet razor-sharp and devastating. Its edge is heat treated to keep its sharpness for a long time. An amazing tool for self defense, and can be used as a digging tool as a last resort.

<color="red">Can be used in the health panel to amputate severely infected limbs.
main.sledgehammerdsc: A tool with a large, flat metal head, attached to a long handle. Not made for digging.
main.woodpickaxedsc: A pickaxe made out of a particularly disappointing material. Efficient at removing terrain, but slow and brittle.
main.wooddiggingtooldsc: A piece of sharpened wood on a stick. Barely better at digging than claws.
main.machetedsc:
A big, broad metal blade. Would do well in melee combat. You feel uneasy holding it.

<color="red">Can be used in the health panel to amputate severely infected limbs.
main.crudecleaverdsc:
Cobbled together metal cleaver, with a blade nailed onto the handle. Would do well in crafting. You feel uneasy holding it.

<color="red">Can be used in the health panel to amputate severely infected limbs.
main.sickledsc:
A metal tool with a curved blade, made to harvest crops or cut through vegetation.

<color="red">Can be used in the health panel to amputate severely infected limbs.
main.woodsickledsc: A wooden tool with a curved blade, made to harvest crops or cut through vegetation.
main.rakedsc: Used for softening soil, along other things. Makes you feel like a farmer!
main.clawsdsc:
Even though it looks like a toy, it's scarily tough and sharp. You feel like you'd look cool holding it.

<color="red">Can be used in the health panel to amputate severely infected limbs.
main.troweldsc: Primitive gardening tool, made of wood and metal. Probably better than using your claws.
main.woodtroweldsc: Primitive gardening tool, made of wood. Probably better than using your claws...?
main.experimentfleshdsc: A ripped piece of flesh from one of your own. Filling, but sickening.
main.ropedsc: A few bits of foliage, tied together into a rope. Used for crafting.
main.animalfleshdsc: A ripped piece of meat from a deceased animal, native to this planet. While it is very similar to your own, it's somewhat edible, even if slightly sickening.
main.internalorgansdsc: A solid compressed ball of displaced internal organs, you can see an orange eyeball sticking out. Looks like they came from a creature sized closely to you. Filling, but horribly disgusting and sickening.
main.blobfleshdsc: Oddly gooey piece of flesh. Filling and tasty! Might make you minorly sick.
main.cactusfleshdsc: Sweet, high in water content and prickly. Tasty and hydrating, but it hurts to eat.
main.neuralboosterdsc: An advanced mix of drugs that alters the structure and function of your brain, slightly increasing your mobility permanently. You might not want to use it more than once.
main.watchdsc: Periodically tells you useful info (bleeding time, hidden infections, weight changes, etc). When used, displays run time and temperature. Having a pocket buddy is comforting!
main.tutorialradiodsc: You're usually given one of these for the training sessions. Not sure if the messages are live or pre-recorded. It has a button you can press.
main.mp3playerdsc: Surprisingly, it still seems to work. It has a small storage drive, with a few music tracks saved on it. You could play either of them for your own amusement.
main.mushpeardsc: A part of a hydreed that filters and distributes water. Has an odd weight-absorbing property and an off-putting taste. Lowers body mass when eaten. Seems to have trace opiate concentration.
main.mushtaildsc: The tail-end of a hydreed. Contains a chemical which can instantly knock someone out for a while, with a visible mood increase afterwards. Odd. No nutritional value.
main.aquappledsc: A watery, bubble-shaped fruit. Looks and feels a little disgusting, but has high water content. Decays very fast.
main.duffelbagdsc: A decently sized bag made of fabric.
main.bikehelmetdsc: A helmet designed to reduce the severity of impacts to the head. Reduces head injuries from falls.
main.riothelmetdsc: An advanced helmet that greatly reduces the severity of head trauma.
main.holidayhatdsc: You've heard that people wear these for some kind of special occasion, though you're not sure what it's about. It's nice that you were sent with one, at least.
main.headlampdsc: A little flashlight, made to be strapped onto your forehead. Loses battery over time.
main.dustmaskdsc: A slightly sturdy mask that covers your mouth. Offers minor head protection.
main.scarfdsc: Red, warm, and fuzzy, this long scarf provides some insulation from the elements. Makes you feel like a mercenary...
main.blueprintdsc: Has the recipe for some kind of object written on it. There is some kind of electronic chip attached to it... Use to learn the recipe and gain INT experience.
main.safetyglassesdsc: A sturdy pair of plastic glasses. Offers minor head protection.
main.autozoomgogglesdsc: A pair of goggles that have the ability to zoom in the user's vision to see farther.
main.blindfolddsc: A black piece of cloth to cover your eyes with. Offers slight protection, but closes your character's eyes.
main.balaclavadsc: A thick, padded piece of cloth to go around your skull. Offers minor protection and decent insulation.
main.latexglovesdsc: A pair of simple latex gloves. Offers minor insulation from the elements.
main.tacticalglovesdsc: A pair of advanced synthetic gloves. Effectively protects your hands from physical trauma.
main.fannypackdsc: A small bag made to be put on your belly.
main.bandolierdsc: A pocketed belt that goes over your shoulder, made to hold ammunition. Can hold firearm rounds.
main.bellyarmordsc: A big piece of metal, made to be strapped on your abdomen. Provides great protection, and some insulation.
main.beltdsc: A leather belt that goes over your belly. Can only hold tools.
main.traumarigdsc: An advanced synthetic protective pouch that can hold various tools, weapons and medical gear. Also protects your torso!
main.popcorndsc: A bucket containing a bunch of corn kernels, puffed up from being heated. You find it to be quite a novel concept. Tasty. Has a long shelf life.
main.nopopcorndsc: Empty paper bucket. You could store something in it.
main.spacedraindsc: Using advanced teleportation technology, it can drain liquids away from you on use. No one really knows where the lost matter goes... Not like that's your problem, though. Automatically recharges.
main.hoodiedsc: A black, very oversized hoodie that keeps you warm and has a small pocket.
main.metabolismchipdsc: A chip that slightly increases your metabolism, making your limbs regenerate much faster, but using more hunger to do so.
main.xalorisspongedsc: The ripped off, shriveled up spore container of a Xaloris. Can be used a limb to counteract infection or eaten for nutritional value. Its spores might impact your immune system.
main.jetpackdsc: A device worn as a backpack which uses jets to propel the wearer through the air. Has limited fuel and will be impaired while wet. Hold W to use. It also has a little pocket to store things inside.
main.dynamitedsc: An explosive made of nitroglycerin, sorbents, and stabilizers. Good for making holes in the terrain. Not very good for your ears.
main.climbingclawsdsc: A pair of steel claws that go over your hands, specifically designed to attach to walls effectively. Grants you the ability to walljump on the same wall indefinitely.
main.plasmacutterdsc: A device that generates a directed flow of plasma. Very good at cutting through metal blocks. Can be used in the health panel to cauterize wounds.
main.grapplinghookdsc: A metal device that launches a hook attached with a rope. The instruction manual is missing.
main.ceftriaxonedsc: A 100ml syringe that can inject fluid intravenously. This one has a small bottle next to it to draw from.
main.woundgluedsc: A 80ml tube, usually filled with wound glue. Applies 20ml of liquid per use.
main.boneweldingtooldsc: A very experimental bit of technology that welds a fracture back together, vastly speeding up healing. Causes some damage to the limb due to the process - better have some dressing ready.
main.paprikashdsc: A paste made from ground fish, rice, tomato paste and vegetable oil, seasoned with onion, salt and spices. It looks and smells rather appealing.
main.carcassdsc: The hard, crushed remains of a sizeable insect. Used in crafting.
main.largecarcassdsc: Two insect carcasses joined together, forming a half-tube shape. Used in crafting.
main.carcasssplintdsc: A hard, long tube made from multiple joined carcasses. Functions as a decent makeshift splint for treating fractures.
main.terrainscannerdsc: Shows you a low-quality map of the terrain below you. Terrain is highlighted in green, solid buildings in red. Might be slightly inaccurate. Goes 24 meters down.
main.geigercounterdsc: An electronic instrument for detecting and measuring ionizing radiation with the use of a Geiger–Müller tube. Use to toggle.
main.handcrankdsc: A device which can recharge spent batteries via a manual cranking motion. Slot in a battery and crank away!
main.sleepingbagdsc: An insulated covering for a person to sleep in. Use to sleep in it, bumping the sleeping quality up a tier (capped at Good) and giving you some insulation for the night. Normal sleep restrictions apply.
main.liquidcentrifugedsc: A handheld centrifuge that can inefficiently split a mixture into its base components. The process is rather complex and results in about a third of the total liquid volume being lost. Recharges every 60 seconds.
main.epdadsc: Electronic personal digital assistant, likely accidentally left in a lifepod by your captors. If you get a battery into it, you could probably read up on their notes and gain some new knowledge.
main.bloodcoagulantdsc: A 100ml syringe with an auto-injector at the end. Dosage is ~34mL.
main.combatpendsc: A 100ml injector pen which instantly injects its contents into the body. Contains a mixture intended to quickly stabilize casualties and aid in combat scenarios.
main.streptokinasedsc: A 100ml syringe with an auto-injector at the end. Dosage is ~34mL.
main.chestdraindsc: Used to drain fluid from the thorax. Reduces hemothoraces, reusable after some time. Only usable on the chest.
main.tweezersdsc: A simple pair of metal tweezers. Can cleanly and painlessly remove shrapnel from limbs.
main.lockpickingkitdsc: A small array of tools used to efficiently get all sorts of locks open. Have it in your main inventory when picking a lock to use. Needs 10 INT to use, effectiveness scales with higher INT.
main.icepackdsc: A cold bag filled with self-cooling refrigerant gel. Speeds up muscle healing, reduces pain and cools you down slightly. Automatically cools itself over time.
main.armwarmersdsc: A pair of blue arm warmers. Provides some insulation against the cold.
main.carapacedsc: A sturdy steel carapace to protect your thorax. Feels royal.
main.limbwrapsdsc: Makeshift wraps made from gauze to cover the extremities. Slightly protects your arms and feet from damage and makes you feel like a warrior.
main.kneepadsdsc: Plastic pads, made to protect the knees and cushion impacts.
main.plushiedsc: It makes a squeaky noise when you squish it. You could take your frustration out on it when feeling down...
main.tornshirtdsc: An old, torn blue shirt. Provides a small bit of protection and insulation.
main.rangefinderdsc: A device used to measure distances to remote objects. Tells you the distance to whatever you're pointing at when used.
main.mindwipedsc: A 60ml pill bottle. Because mindwiping is a painful process, it comes with an equal mix of morphine to ease the transition slightly.
main.scubadivinggeardsc: Lets you indefinitely breathe and regenerate stamina underwater, makes you move faster in liquids and dries you out quickly after resurfacing. The pool floaties are retrofitted.
main.filterstrawdsc: Can be used to safely drink groundwater and reduce the health impact of other liquids when held in the main hand. Also works when drinking from bottles.
main.wrenchdsc: A tool used to provide grip and mechanical advantage in applying torque to turn objects. Can be used on dislocated limbs to correct them more effectively than with your bare hands. Also makes for a decent hammering tool.
main.makeshiftwrenchdsc: A crude tool that's probably better at hitting bolts into place than actually turning them. It won't help with dislocations, but is useful in crafting.
main.bruisekitdsc: A combination of drugs and other medicines, made to aid muscle healing. Increases muscle/skin health and highly aids dislocations. Doesn't affect bleeding.
main.medicalsuturedsc: Used to stitch wounds back together. Instantly stops most bleeding and increases skin health.
main.tourniquetdsc: When applied, it cuts off circulation to the limb, stopping all bleeding in the affected area (though it does not heal the wound). It must be removed after some time, as it causes pain and deprives the limb of oxygen. Reusable.
main.browncapdsc: You aren't sure what kind of fungus it is exactly. For all you know, it could do anything from curing wounds to killing you on the spot.
main.sneakersdsc: A pair of white sneakers, that are not at all made to go over your feet. If you manage to somehow squish your paws in them, provides protection from glass shards.
main.tacticalbootsdsc: A pair of heavy synthetic boots, made to effectively protect the feet from various forms of trauma.
main.frigiantfruitdsc: A very cold, hard and glassy fruit. Tasty, but has a tendency to cool you down a lot. Consider not consuming it out in the freezing cold.
main.hellucedsc: A dry, purple herb with an especially spicy taste. Helps against sickness, slightly helps hearing loss and might lessen internal bleeding. It has a tendency to highly increase the consumer's body temperature.
main.bulbskindsc: A piece of thick, yellow membrane. Satiates thirst, but might minorly affect brain function. Can also be used as a makeshift bandage and analgesic.
main.popfruitdsc: An odd, rectangular shiny fruit. Tasty, refills hunger and thirst. May randomly help or intensify radiation sickness slightly. Has a loud reaction when impacting the ground at speeds - useful for checking drop height.
main.antisepticmushdsc: Smushed together bits of fruit and foliage, resulting in a mixture effective in treating infections. Lasts one use.
main.striderpeltdsc: A large piece of thick, fluffy white pelt ripped from a snow strider. Offers considerable insulation from the elements.
main.funguschunkdsc: A ripped piece of fungi. Does a decent enough job as food, though you're unsure about the side effects.
main.clottingmushdsc: A small vial of a clot-promoting poultice. Needs to be held in a special container in order to not go bad. While not particularly useful on its own, it could be refined further...
main.bunchunkdsc: A piece of fungus with clot-promoting properties. While not particularly useful on its own, it could be refined further...
main.smallbatterydsc: A small battery that can be inserted into various electronic devices. Stores half as much as a medium battery.
main.mediumbatterydsc: A generic battery that can be inserted into various electronic devices. Stores twice as much as a small battery, but a third as much as a large one.
main.largebatterydsc: A large industrial battery that can be inserted into certain electronic devices. Stores three times as much as a medium battery.
main.pistoldsc: A basic, semi-automatic handgun. Uses small magazines loaded with 9mm rounds. Might jam when wet or low condition. Hold in your main hand to use and see controls.
main.rifledsc: A stockless, fully automatic rifle. Uses rifle magazines loaded with 5.56 rounds. Might jam when wet or low condition. Hold in your main hand to use and see controls.
main.shotgundsc: A stockless, pump-action shotgun with an internal magazine. Uses 12 gauge shells loaded directly into the gun. Might jam when wet or low condition. Hold in your main hand to use and see controls.
main.9mmrounddsc: A small handgun round. Can be loaded into a small magazine, or directly into the chamber if the gun's bolt is open.
main.556rounddsc: A rifle round. Can be loaded into a rifle magazine, or directly into the chamber if the gun's bolt is open.
main.12gaugedsc: A 12 gauge buckshot round. Can be loaded into shotguns, or directly into the chamber if the gun's bolt is open.
main.boxof12gaugedsc: A box that can store sixteen 12-Gauge rounds. Use to unload a shell to insert into a firearm.
main.smallmagazinedsc: A universal handgun magazine that accepts 9mm rounds.
main.riflemagazinedsc: A universal rifle magazine that accepts 5.56 rounds.
main.magazinebasedsc: A specially shaped container with a spring in it. Used in magazine and firearm making.
main.makeshiftrifledsc: An improvised bolt-action firearm, made of scrapped together tubes and gun scraps. Uses small magazines loaded with 9mm rounds. Might jam when wet or low condition. Hold in your main hand to use and see controls.
main.casingdsc: Empty casing. While it's not of much use by itself, you could use it in crafting.
main.scrapcubedsc: Solid cube made of melted scrap metal. Not particularly strong, but will do in crafting.
main.scrappaneldsc: Thin sheet of scrap metal. Not particularly strong, but will do in crafting.
main.scraptubedsc: Hollow tube made of scrap metal. Not particularly strong, but will do in crafting. Could act as a shoddy makeshift hammer.
main.woodscrapsdsc: Bits and pieces of smashed wood. You could probably make them into a crafting material.
main.woodcubedsc: Solid cube made of melted together wood. While it's very frail, it's also light.
main.woodpaneldsc: Thin sheet made of wood. While it's very frail, it's also light.
main.canvasdsc: Thin, flexible sheet made of plant matter. Light and decently durable for what it is.
main.nailsdsc: A pile of crudely made nails. Should be enough to last a few recipes. You'll probably need a hammer to drive them.
main.stringdsc: A thin, deceptively durable string made of prepared plant matter. Used in more intricate recipes.
main.stickdsc: A short wooden stick. While it's very frail, it's also light. Way too small to use as a weapon. Could act as a shoddy makeshift hammer.
main.ilmenitechunkdsc: A titanium-iron oxide mineral. Though costly, it can be processed into a strong titanium alloy.
main.titaniumslabdsc: A rectangular slab made of a strong titanium alloy. Can be used for advanced crafting.
main.titaniumroddsc: A solid rod made of a strong titanium alloy. Can be used for advanced crafting, and as a makeshift hammer.
main.titaniumsheetdsc: A thin, yet firm sheet made of a strong titanium alloy. Can be used for advanced crafting.
main.rawcopperdsc: Raw chunk of heavily oxidized copper. You could refine it for use in electronics.
main.processedcopperdsc: Chunk of bio-chem processed copper. Malleable and conductive, you could turn it into wiring for electronics.
main.plasticchunkdsc: A chunk of flexible plastic which has been visibly forcibly displaced. Usable in crafting, mainly in electronics.
main.flexiglassdsc: A thin sheet of flexible, transparent material, made from chemically treated plastic. Used in crafting.
main.bundleofwiresdsc: Bundle of neatly tied together wires with some isolation around them. Used in electronics crafting.
main.flimsyknifedsc:
A small, dull, brittle knife. Can be used for rudimentary crafting. Little to no use in combat.

<color="red">Can be used in the health panel to amputate severely infected limbs.
main.craftingbottledsc: Improvised water container. Cannot be refilled and will soon disappear. Transfer the contents somewhere before it's gone.
main.nondescriptcandsc: A bland, unlabeled can of... something. It doesn't look or smell like anything in particular. Might be good, might be not.
main.canteendsc: Simple, small bottle for holding liquids, made with some glued together chunks of plastic tied together with rope. Holds 300mL.
main.lcdscreendsc: A simple electronic display, used in crafting.
main.autoinjectordsc: A medical marvel when it was invented, this little device is able to automatically find a vein or artery to inject to and deliver the provided dosage. Used in medicinal crafting.
main.keratinboosterdsc: A 100mL bottle labelled as a nail care supplement. Dosage is 50mL per drink.
main.drillrepairkitdsc: A small bundle of spare parts, made to repair Drill Pods. You could use one of these to get a pod back into a working state.
main.campfiredsc: A lit campfire. Warm and cozy, you'll heat up when next to it. Used as a heat source in a variety of food recipes.
main.firestarterdsc: A device to start a fire by friction between a rapidly rotating wooden rod and a cavity on a stationary wood piece. In layman's terms, stick rotatey, fire starty. Can be used up to 3 times before burning out.
main.charcoaldsc: Small, light piece of charcoal. Can be used as a flammable ingredient for crafting.
main.ryebulbdsc: A thin sack filled with grain. You could pound it down into a flour if you had a hammering tool.
main.ryeflourdsc: A powder mainly used in making baked goods. You'll probably need some water and a heat source to work with it.
main.breaddsc: A loaf of bread, made of flour and water. About the simplest thing you could eat, though not repulsive and will last for a long time.
main.cakedsc: A baked, sweet pastry with some glaze layered ontop. Large, filling and very tasty, though the sugar content makes it a little sickening if eaten too much.
main.pemmicandsc: A mixture of fat, dried meat, and dehydrated fruit. Lasts a long time and is very calorie-dense. Tastes neutral.
main.torchdsc: Extremely primitive lightsource. While it lights up the way pretty well, it will be put out by liquids. You can relight it with a flame source.
main.lighterdsc: A generic flip top lighter. Can be used as a flame source for many crafting recipes, such as lighting campfires. Lasts many, many uses.
main.presentdsc: A decorated paper box, seemingly filled with something. Use it to unpack it.
main.woodsandalsdsc: A wood panel attached to your paws with rope. Not comfortable in any way, but it will protect you from sharp debris... If you're lucky, more than one time!
main.minibarreldsc: A small, industrial barrel made for storing liquids. Extremely heavy and impractical to use.

buildings.fungalibungalidsc: A small patch of greenish mushrooms. You might be able to harvest one of the caps if you're lucky.
buildings.mushroomplatformdsc: A sturdy piece of fungi you can stand on.
buildings.climbingropeextendeddsc: Extended length of sturdy rope. Hold up near it to start climbing.
buildings.drillpoddsc: Used for transporting people long distances through solid ground. While it's not in a functional state, you could get it working if you bring a repair kit. Can be used to skip 2 layers downwards.
buildings.drillpoddscfixed:
Used for transporting people long distances through solid ground.

Crouch inside it to skip 2 layers downwards. Might cause some hearing loss, as the soundproofing is worn out.
buildings.frigiantdsc: An icy, glassy plant. A spherical bulb is hanging from it.
buildings.snowstriderdsc: A large, fluffy creature that hunts for food in the cold regions of this cave system. Its thick pelt keeps it warm.
buildings.spaceheaterdsc: A device that strongly heats the area around it. Might induce minor radiation sickness if you're too close for too long.
buildings.xalorisdsc: A spongy and brambly fern that heats up the air around it to spread spores to its surroundings. Keeps the cold at bay, but breathing in the spores for too long might mess with your immune system.
buildings.lifepodheaterdsc: Keeps the inside nice and cozy.
buildings.tutorialcraftingbuttondsc: Press this if you messed something up and need to start over.
buildings.beartrapdsc: A set of two jaws with spiked teeth.
buildings.bioterminaldsc: A computer terminal with a plate under it and writing that reads "Insert human DNA sample to continue..."
buildings.lifepodshowerdsc: Provides a one-time spray of antiseptic cleaning foam.
buildings.BloodCrystaldsc: It seems to be moist with yellow liquid, releasing it into anything around it.
buildings.cactusdsc: Back up there, you were told these are supposed to be green. They didn't lie about it being prickly at least.
buildings.coildsc: Good for instantly frying anything conductive.
buildings.sandvinedsc: A long, sturdy vine. You could climb it, though doing so might be difficult if it's too thin.
buildings.ladderdsc: A vertical set of rungs used for climbing or descending. You assumably know how to use it.
buildings.wallbiterdsc: A large, fluffy, six legged beast. You can see what looks like sharp teeth sticking out. It's moving around erratically.
buildings.thornbackyoungdsc: A young, fluffy and very much aggressive thornback. They seemingly enjoy tunneling through the ground and ripping apart any moving thing nearby.
buildings.overgrowntickdsc: A cave tick that had way too much food and space to grow. As aggressive as usual.
buildings.DigestionCrystaldsc: It has a weird look and feel to it.
buildings.dropcapsuledsc: An artificial warmth emanates from it.
buildings.lifepodbuttonheatdsc: A red, cheap looking button. This one toggles the lifepod heater and A/C. It's currently set to <>.
buildings.lifepodbuttonshowerdsc: A red, cheap looking button. This one activates the lifepod's cleaning and disinfecting gas shower.
buildings.EmissiveCrystaldsc: A rather bright light emanates from it.
buildings.geotreedsc: It's squishy! Has weirdly geometrical leaf-looking things on it.
buildings.glowplantdsc: A green, bioluminescent plant. It seems to be rather unfazed by the environment.
buildings.jumppaddsc: It has a pressure plate on it.
buildings.leadbushdsc: It has pieces of heavy metal growing on it. While it looks like a plant, it's actually an animal!
buildings.lifepodchestdsc: Likely to contain basic survival gear.
buildings.LifePodLightdsc: Has a lightbulb in it - you could probably take it.
buildings.rechargingstationdsc:
A station used for recharging batteries. Accepts batteries of any size, and has seemingly infinite power. Use to insert a battery from your main hand, then drag the battery back onto yourself.

It seems to have a music player to soothe the atmosphere while you wait... Ironically, it lacks a battery.
buildings.hydreeddsc: It has multiple arms with bubbly fruits at the ends. It looks moist...
buildings.OxygenCrystaldsc: It seems to be slowly bubbling...
buildings.reinforceddoordsc: Can probably be opened by something...
buildings.crystalenemydsc: An expression of malignant intent, from something far, far beyond your limited physical comprehension.
buildings.sandrosedsc: An oddly beautiful plant with a few large, oblong shapes growing on it.
buildings.scrapeaterdsc: It has a label on it that reads "Insert scrap to open", with a small monitor next to it displaying <color=#ffffff>"<>%".
buildings.shuttledoordsc: A big piece of metal to keep outside things outside and inside things, inside.
buildings.shuttleelevatordsc: The time you've spent sitting on this thing makes up a concerning percent of your entire lifetime.
buildings.spikestabberdsc: Looks scary. You could probably deactivate it...
buildings.stoneplantdsc: It's a clump of hard, stone-like material with squishy green blobs stuck onto it.
buildings.turretdsc: Seems to have some sort of heat detector on it.
buildings.stalactitedsc: It seems loosely connected to the ceiling.
buildings.icestalactitedsc: It seems loosely connected to the ceiling.
buildings.stalactitedscdropped: It, in fact, is no longer connected to the ceiling.
buildings.drybushdsc: You have a sneaking suspicion that it's dead.
buildings.brownshroomdsc: You can't say much more about it other than the fact that it is, in fact, brown.
buildings.spentfueldsc: An oddly terrifying energy emanates from it.
buildings.soundcannondsc: You should probably cover your ears if you hear it charging.
buildings.traderdsc: Another unlucky victim. At least they're still breathing.
buildings.traderdscdead: They're not breathing anymore. Thanks to you.
buildings.bananaplantdsc: A short, wide plant, colloquially called the "Banana Plant" due to its mushy, yellow top. Very slippery to step on.
buildings.geyserdsc: An unstable geyser with a tendency to shoot out water. Luckily, it's room temperature at worst.
buildings.oilpipedsc: A rusty pipe with a dark tar pouring from it. You don't want to look inside... Will probably flood the area given enough time.
buildings.popdsc: A long, dull purple colored plant, with a large semi-transparent bulb growing on the end.
buildings.mushroomdropperdsc: A fungus that releases its cap to spread its spores around any unfortunate passerbys.
buildings.mushroomdropperpayloaddsc: It's the part that falls down and hurts.
buildings.mushroomropedsc: A long piece of fungus. It looks like you could climb on it pretty easily.
buildings.sidestabberdsc: An odd animal fused with a fungus. Launches a large spike at any passing prey.
buildings.ceilingryedsc: Oddly thin patch of grass with oblong sacks hanging at the ends. It looks like they're filled with grain of some kind.
buildings.grabberplantdsc: It appears to be feeling around the environment with its tip.
buildings.grabbershroomdsc: You struggle to understand how fungus can do this.

moodles.braindamage2dsc: Strong mental deficit. Ability to think intelligently and self-sustain is limited. Serious brain damage present.
moodles.braindamage1dsc: Mentally impaired from damage to the brain. You feel weirdly confused...
moodles.strokedsc: Bleeding in the brain, likely caused by severe hypertension. Already in its advanced stages, chances of survival are nil unless you have Braingrow or a procoagulant.
moodles.cantbreathedsc: Suffocating! Loss of consciousness and death imminent if untreated.
moodles.thoraxdestroyeddsc: Your lungs are too damaged to function, caused by critically low thorax muscle health.
moodles.pulmonaryembolismdsc: A large blood clot has broken off and lodged itself in the lungs, blocking an artery. Rapid lung damage and suffocation incoming. Lower your blood viscosity urgently.
moodles.oxygen1dsc: SpO2 below 90%. While not dangerous, it could be a sign of an underlying condition.
moodles.oxygen2dsc: SpO2 below 75%, causing tachycardia and slowly depriving the brain of oxygen. While not lethal, it does point at an underlying condition.
moodles.oxygen3dsc: SpO2 below 60%, depriving tissues of oxygen and likely causing heart arrhythmia. Lethal if left to progress.
moodles.oxygen4dsc: SpO2 below 45%. Something in your body has gone horribly, horribly wrong. Lethal if left to progress.
moodles.fibrillation1dsc: Abnormal heart rhythm, likely caused by severe strain to the body. May progress further if the cause isn't addressed. Can be defibrillated.
moodles.fibrillation2dsc: Severe irregular heartbeat, preventing effective blood pumping. Will progress into lethal V-fib if not treated. Can be defibrillated.
moodles.fibrillation3dsc: Life threatening, chaotic heart rhythm. Asystole is soon to follow. Things have gone horribly wrong.
moodles.palpitationsdsc: You feel your heart pounding out of your chest. Are you just anxious, or is something horribly wrong?
moodles.cardiacarrestdsc: Asystole. If you're somehow conscious, this has a low chance of being treated via defibrillation. Otherwise, cerebral hypoxia and death is soon to follow.
moodles.hypoventilation2dsc: Highly lowered respiratory rate, enough to slowly lower blood oxygen concentration.
moodles.hypotension1dsc: Slightly decreased blood pressure. You feel slightly dizzy.
moodles.hypotension2dsc: Moderately decreased blood pressure. You look pale and have clammy skin. Something is wrong - check your vitals.
moodles.hypotension3dsc: Severely decreased blood pressure, you're on the edge of fainting. Treatment needed. This might start fibrillation, check your vitals.
moodles.hypotension4dsc: Lethally low blood pressure. Blood is not getting to your organs. Cerebral hypoxia and death is imminent.
moodles.hypertension2dsc: Moderately elevated blood pressure. You have a headache, you're dizzy and your nose is bleeding. Check your vitals.
moodles.hypertension3dsc: Severely elevated blood pressure, dangerously close to having severe health complications. You feel terrible. Check your vitals.
moodles.hypertension4dsc: Life-threatening blood pressure. Risk of hemorrhagic stroke. Check your vitals urgently, and watch for stroke symptoms.
moodles.venom1dsc: Slight hemotoxin presence in the bloodstream. Did something bite you?
moodles.venom2dsc: Hemotoxin present in the bloodstream, impairing blood clotting and destroying blood cells. Watch for vital signs.
moodles.venom3dsc: Large amount of hemotoxin present in the bloodstream, clogging your blood and destroying blood cells. Watch for vital signs.
moodles.venom4dsc: Your blood more closely resembles marmalade than something that can upkeep life.
moodles.pain2dsc: Hurting a decent bit. Unhappiness rising slowly.
moodles.pain3dsc: Half-conscious, mind fogged by intense pain. Unhappiness rising.
moodles.pain4dsc: Mind-shattering pain. Movement compromised. Death sounds preferable right about now. Unhappiness rising quickly.
moodles.overdose1dsc: Relaxed and calm. Your body feels numb.
moodles.overdose2dsc: Very relaxed and calm, but your lungs feel heavy. A little more tired than usual. This feels pretty good, for now...
moodles.overdose3dsc: Breathing is difficult, but your mind is in euphoria. This definitely isn't healthy. If only it could last forever...
moodles.overdose4dsc: Respiratory failure. You are experiencing a drug-filled euphoria. Asphyxiation imminent.
moodles.withdrawal2dsc: Your body is desperate for another hit. You want to vomit... This feels really bad. Treatment recommended.
moodles.withdrawal3dsc: You are struggling to hold yourself together, shaking, desperate for any sort of relief. It feels horrible. Treatment needed.
moodles.withdrawal4dsc: Your body is failing to sustain itself without the opiates it became so reliant on. Your heart is struggling to pump blood around the body; Watch for fibrillation.
moodles.stimulateddsc: Hard stimulant drugs in the bloodstream. You feel ready to tackle anything thrown at you...For now, at least.
moodles.drugoverdosedsc: You have overdosed on a non-opioid drug. Health complications likely.
moodles.bleeding1dsc: Blood is oozing out of a relatively small wound. There is no immediate danger.
moodles.bleeding2dsc: Blood is flowing out of a decently sized wound. Unlikely to be fatal if you're healthy. Treatment recommended.
moodles.bleeding3dsc: A large volume of blood is haemorrhaging out of your body. Likely lethal if untreated. Treatment needed.
moodles.bleeding4dsc: <i>As your life gushes out behind you, you remember that you are mortal.
moodles.internalBleeddsc: Turns out your guts and lungs are NOT where the blood is supposed to be. Treatment recommended.
moodles.highbloodvolume2dsc: Body bloated, blood pressure high, feeling dizzy with a headache.
moodles.highbloodvolume3dsc: Grossly bloated. Extremely high blood pressure. Can barely stand, or think.
moodles.highbloodvolume4dsc: There's a terrible pain in your chest... Vital signs fading. Blood volume and pressure way too high.
moodles.exertion2dsc: Uncomfortably exerted, struggling to move and work. (<>%)
moodles.exertion3dsc: Barely able to move, highly physically exerted. (<>%)
moodles.brokenbonedsc: You broke something. Try not to use the affected limb, and rest as much as possible. Treatment highly recommended.
moodles.dislocationdsc: You dislocated something. Try not to use the affected limb, and find a way to fix it. Treatment recommended.
moodles.brokenneckdsc: Your neck is broken. Your spinal cord isn't severed, but any amount of moving around will be agonizing. Physically weaker from the neck down. Eating is painful.
moodles.brokenribsdsc: Your ribs are broken, making breathing painful and much harder. Hope none of them punctured your lungs. Weakened arm strength.
moodles.dislocatedjawdsc: Your jaw is dislocated, impairing your speech and making eating anything extremely painful.
moodles.dislocatedspinedsc: Your spine is dislocated. Your spinal cord isn't severed, but moving your body at all is really painful. Physically weaker from the waist down.
moodles.infected1dsc: The infection site is swollen and warm. Treatment needed. Find something that can kill off foreign bodies.
moodles.infected2dsc: The infection site is leaking dark pus, and is swelling more. Treatment needed.
moodles.infected3dsc: The infection is spreading across the limb quickly and painfully. Chances of going into sepsis. Urgent treatment needed.
moodles.infected4dsc: The infection is spreading to other limbs, and the infected limb is starting to undergo necrosis. Sepsis is setting in. Emergency care needed.
moodles.sepsis1dsc: A widespread infection is causing your body to react badly. You feel confused, with lowered blood pressure and a fever. Lethal if progresses.
moodles.sepsis2dsc: Increased heart rate, lowered blood pressure, lightheadedness and a strong fever. Signs of organ dysfunction. Likely to soon enter septic shock.
moodles.sepsis3dsc: You couldn't stop for death, so death has kindly stopped by for you. Circulatory collapse imminent.
moodles.concussiondsc: Rendered unconscious by low head vitality - you will wake up when your head heals.
moodles.unconsciousdsc: Not responding to any external stimuli. Lights out.
moodles.incapacitateddsc: Can't stand or think. You barely feel anything.
moodles.confused2dsc: Confused and dizzy, struggling to keep up with the world around you.
moodles.confused3dsc: Barely conscious, feeling like you could collapse at any moment.
moodles.tired4dsc: Barely awake, about to collapse from exhaustion.
moodles.hunger1dsc: Could do with a bite to eat.
moodles.hunger2dsc: Uncomfortably hungry. Slightly weaker than usual.
moodles.hunger3dsc: Extremely hungry, desperate for satiation. Weaker than usual.
moodles.hunger4dsc: Your entire body, just wasting away... Total organ failure imminent.
moodles.hunger5dsc: Eating good today! Lowered weight loss rate and mobility. Slight happiness increase.
moodles.hunger6dsc: Stomach totally stuffed with food! Any more and you'll be sick. Greatly lowered weight loss rate and mobility. Happiness increase.
moodles.thirst2dsc: Low body water volume. Very thirsty.
moodles.thirst3dsc: Body drying out, in desperate need of water. Mind consumed by thirst.
moodles.thirst4dsc:
Blood volume dangerously low and thick due to lack of fluids.
<i>Your dust is becoming one with the earth...
moodles.overhydrated1dsc: Your thirst is fully satiated - you won't need water for a while. Thirst rate doubled. Blood pressure increased.
moodles.overhydrated2dsc: You've drank considerably more than needed. Movement slightly impaired. Thirst rate doubled. Blood pressure increased.
moodles.overhydrated3dsc: Excessive water intake. Your cells are swelling, causing high intracranial pressure, interrupting blood flow to the brain. Your head hurts... Thirst rate doubled. Blood pressure highly increased.
moodles.sick2dsc: Confused, uncomfortable around the stomach. Prone to vomiting.
moodles.sick3dsc: Lethargic, tired and in major discomfort. Very prone to vomiting.
moodles.sick4dsc: Dangerously sick. Something is VERY wrong on the inside. Weak, confused and in a world of pain.
moodles.hot3dsc: Dangerously hot. You're struggling to go on in the heat... Thirst highly increased.
moodles.hot4dsc: Cells are starting to die from the intense heat. Irreversible organ damage imminent.
moodles.cold2dsc: Unpleasantly cold. Your body is slowing down.
moodles.cold3dsc: Dangerously low temperature, body and mind taken by the cold. Your entire body is slowly shutting down.
moodles.cold4dsc: You feel like you're burning up, but you're so tired and confused. You could go for a long nap...
moodles.wet2dsc: Considerably wet. Temperature and comfort decreased.
moodles.wet3dsc: Dripping wet. Temperature and comfort considerably decreased.
moodles.wet4dsc: Completely drenched! The water is weighing you down. Temperature and comfort highly decreased.
moodles.underweight1dsc: Try to pack on a few kilos.
moodles.underweight2dsc: Unhealthily underweight considering your species. Weaker than normal. Lowered carrying capacity.
moodles.underweight3dsc: You're dangerously thin and frail. Way weaker than normal, prone to being tired and lethargic. Lowered carrying capacity.
moodles.underweight4dsc: You're excessively skinny. You can easily see and feel your bones through your fur. At high risk of heart failure. Very lowered carrying capacity.
moodles.overweight1dsc: Try to lose a few kilos.
moodles.overweight2dsc: Unhealthily overweight, though you look about average compared to other species. Clumsier, you get tired quicker.
moodles.overweight3dsc: Dangerously wide and soft. Way clumsier and more prone to exhaustion.
moodles.overweight4dsc: Life-threatenigly obese. It's like you stuffed a bag of fur with pure fat and hunger. At high risk of heart failure.
moodles.depression1dsc: Starting to realize the gravity of your situation. Try to distract yourself.
moodles.depression2dsc: Lacking the motivation to go on, struggling with emotions. Things really aren't looking up. Find a way to distract yourself.
moodles.depression3dsc: Barely willing to do anything. Your mind, ravaged by desperation. Maybe it will all be over soon?
moodles.depression4dsc: <i>How does it feel, knowing you're not coming back up..?
moodles.trauma1dsc: Something bad has happened to you, and your brain does NOT want to experience it again. Happiness slightly reduced.
moodles.trauma2dsc: Recent events have left you uneasy and scarred. You feel shaky. You REALLY don't want to go through that again. Happiness reduced.
moodles.trauma3dsc: You feel panicked and horrified. Visions of past horrors flash before your eyes. You want OUT of here by any means necessary... This wound will take a good while to heal. Happiness highly reduced.
moodles.trauma4dsc: Horrified. Helpless. Hopeless. You can't muster a single word. Happiness severely reduced.
moodles.happy2dsc: Looking forward to what's around the corner.
moodles.happy3dsc: You've found peace in this strange land.
moodles.happy4dsc: You're at the top of the world, shaping the way forward at your will. Nothing can stop you!
moodles.impairedspeechdsc: Something is making speaking difficult... You might have trouble communicating with others.
moodles.deaf2dsc: You can't hear those high frequencies as well as before. Let your ears rest for a while.
moodles.deaf3dsc: Everything sounds very muffled and echo-y. You feel irritated. This may take a bit.
moodles.deaf4dsc: You can barely hear anything. You feel very irritated. Your ears will take a good while to improve.
moodles.encumbered1dsc: Carrying a bit much for comfort. <> encumbrance.
moodles.encumbered2dsc: Carrying too much. Stamina and mobility decreased. Passively gain STR/RES. <> encumbrance.
moodles.encumbered3dsc: Carrying way too much. Stamina and mobility highly decreased. Passively gain STR/RES. <> encumbrance.
moodles.encumbered4dsc: Practically unable to move. Carrying WAY, way too much. Passively gain STR/RES. <> encumbrance.
moodles.irradiated2dsc: Feverish and nauseous. Your skin feels hot and painful. Something is very wrong. It's terrifying.
moodles.irradiated3dsc: Horribly sick and aching all over. Breathing and thinking is extremely difficult. You feel abhorrent.
moodles.irradiated4dsc: <i>Not going gently into that good night...
moodles.hemothoraxdsc: Blood is accumulating in the pleural cavity due to internal bleeding, progressively impairing your ability to breathe. Your chest hurts. Treatment recommended.
moodles.badsleepdsc: Your back really isn't appreciating your choice of where you slept. Try picking a less harsh surface next time. Consciousness decreased.
moodles.laststanddsc: You're not going down that easily. Something deep inside you compels you to push through.
moodles.dirty2dsc: While you don't particularly mind the lack of hygiene, your immune system certainly will. Take a bath. (<>%)
moodles.adrenalinedsc: Pain numbed. You're on high alert.
moodles.tachycardiadsc: Your heart rate feels abnormally high.
moodles.bradycardiadsc: Your heart rate feels abnormally low.
moodles.rnrsdsc: Neural shock caused by a sudden and rapid regeneration of brain tissue. While you'll adjust after some time, you might not want to take another dose for now. (<>)
moodles.rippedjawdsc: Your lower jaw has been ripped off due severe trauma to the head. Eating and talking is much harder. You are horribly scarred by the experience.
moodles.rippedeyedsc: One of your eyes has been ripped out, halving your field of view. You are somewhat scarred by the experience. Don't lose the remaining one.
moodles.rippedeyesdsc: Both of your eyes have been ripped out. You can only get by using feel and sound. At least you no longer need a light source...
moodles.lowimmunitydsc: Your immune system is severely weakened, be it due to dirtyness, hunger, thirst or more. Infections are much more dangerous. Take better care of yourself.
moodles.highimmunitydsc: Your immune system is working at high capacity, likely due to antibiotics. Infections are much less dangerous, and might even regress on their own if near 200%.
moodles.amputationdsc: One of your extremities has been dismembered. Traumatizing. Obviously, any use of the lobbed off limb is permanently gone.
moodles.clawdamage1dsc: Your claws are worn down from continuous use, reducing your damage output. Give your hands a break, or use a tool.
moodles.clawdamage2dsc: Your claws are severely damaged from excessive use, severely reducing your damage output. You might damage your hands if you keep using them without a tool.
moodles.keratinboosterdsc: Your claws regrow three times as fast. (<>)
moodles.impendingdoomdsc: You can't help but feel sudden, overwhelming fear. Your skin has goosebumps all over. It's as if the nature around you abruptly fell silent...
moodles.horrifieddsc: CAN'T FOCUS. CAN'T THINK. NOTHING ELSE MATTERS. RUN FOR YOUR LIFE OR FIGHT FOR IT!
moodles.focuseddsc: <i>Both of us die today. One, just a little later than the other.

other.layermodifier0dsc: Khu vực này bị sương mù che phủ.
other.layermodifier1dsc: Nhiệt độ ở đây cao hơn bình thường.
other.layermodifier2dsc: Nhiệt độ ở đây như bị thiêu cháy!
other.layermodifier3dsc: Nhiệt độ ở đây thấp hơn bình thường.
other.layermodifier4dsc: Nhiệt độ ở đây lạnh buốt!
other.layermodifier5dsc: Khu vực này bị ngập lụt bất thường.
other.layermodifier6dsc: Bạn có thể sẽ không tìm được những hồ nước lộ thiên ở đây.
other.layermodifier7dsc: Mưa rơi xuống ở khắp mọi nơi...
other.layermodifier8dsc: Khu vực này dường như là nơi tập trung của côn trùng.
other.layermodifier9dsc: Chất thải phóng xạ bị đổ xuống đây.
other.layermodifier10dsc: Bão mặt trời đã vô hiệu hóa con Chip của bạn trong một lúc.
other.gencreatingterrain: Đang tạo bề mặt để đứng lên...
other.genplacingplayer: Đang tìm vị trí an toàn...
other.gengeneratingborders: Đang xác định vùng biên hang động...
other.genplacingentities: Đang gieo cây và đặt bẫy...
other.gencreatingcolliders: Đang hữu hình hóa các vật thể...
other.strengthdsc:
Chỉ số khối lượng cơ bắp.

Quyết định lượng sát thương gây ra, khả năng ném xa và tốc độ thao tác của tay trên các màn hình nhỏ.
Tăng khả năng mang vác nặng khi kết hợp với chỉ số Bền bỉ.

Làm tăng chỉ số này bằng cách tấn công vật lý, mang vác vượt tải trọng và tập luyện.
other.resiliencedsc:
Chỉ số sức bền thể chất và mức độ giữ vững tâm lý.

Tăng khả năng phục hồi thể lực và giảm tác động của cơn đau.
Tăng khả năng mang vác nặng khi kết hợp với chỉ số Sức mạnh.

Làm tăng chỉ số này bằng cách chịu đau, tấn công các sinh vật, mang vác vượt tải trọng, bậc nhảy, rơi chạm đất từ trên cao và tập luyện.
other.intelligencedsc:
Chỉ số thông thái.

Quyết định những thứ mà bạn có thể nhận diện và chế tạo, và kỹ năng trao đổi, mua bán.

Làm tăng chỉ số này bằng cách chế tạo những thứ mới, đọc bản thiết kế/E-PDA, trao đổi, mua bán và tiến xuống tầng mới.
other.skillup:
Chỉ số <> của bạn vừa tăng lên!
(<1> -> <2>)
other.experienceatstart: Lượng kinh nghiệm cần để ở mức hiện tại
other.experienceatend: Lượng kinh nghiệm cần để tăng lên mức mới
other.missiontime: Thời gian còn lại ở khu vực này
other.lrdserumdsc: Hỗn hợp đặc biệt chỉ được sử dụng thông qua thiết bị hồi sức tại chỗ (LRD), không có tác dụng khi được tiêm bằng những dụng cụ khác.
other.cleanwaterdsc: Nước đã được lọc sạch. An toàn để uống, nhưng vô vị.
other.carbonatedwaterdsc: Uống vào tê lưỡi. Bạn thích cảm giác sủi bọt này.
other.alcoholdsc: Cồn không nhãn mác. Bạn không thể uống nó, nhưng có thể dùng để sát trùng vết thương.
other.milkdsc: Thức uống màu trắng do tuyến vú của động vật có vú tiết ra. Thật ngon và no bụng!
other.sodadsc: Đồ uống ngon, có đường. Tốt khi uống điều độ.
other.lemonadedsc: Thức uống vị chanh ngọt. Ngon quá!
other.urinedsc: Đồ uống vị chanh ngọt. Ngon, mặc dù chả hiểu sao nó cứ ngai ngái mùi khai.
other.bleachdsc: Chất hóa học dùng để tẩy trắng sợi vải hoặc khử trùng vết thương. Cấm uống!
other.energydrinkdsc: Đồ uống chứa caffeine. Ngon và kích thích, nhưng hơi có hại cho loài của bạn.
other.sportsdrinkdsc: Thức uống điện giải không chứa caffeine. Giải khát hiệu quả, cung cấp năng lượng nhẹ và uống ngon.
other.oliveoildsc: Một loại dầu thực vật thu được bằng cách ép toàn bộ quả ô liu. Rất béo và có vị hơi khó uống.
other.icecreamdsc: Một món tráng miệng lạnh được làm từ sữa và kem, có hương vị từ chất tạo ngọt. Nó vẫn lạnh bằng một cách nào nó. Ngon nhức nách!
other.radwaterdsc: Nước đã được lọc sạch. An toàn để uống, nhưng vô vị... Xét kỹ hơn thì hình như nó hơi bị nhiễm phóng xạ.
other.yogurtdsc: Sữa lên men từ vi khuẩn. Vị tạm ổn, khá no bụng.
other.molddsc: Không còn nhận ra đây từng là cái gì nữa. Hôi thối quá...
other.orangejuicedsc: Nước cốt cam. Dù biết là tốt cho sức khỏe, nhưng bạn không thực sự thích nó.
other.applejuicedsc: Nước táo ép được làm bằng cách ngâm và ép táo. Ngon quá!
other.hotsaucedsc: Loại gia vị được làm từ ớt đặc biệt cay. Làm bỏng miệng, nhưng đồng thời cũng làm ấm cơ thể... bằng một cách nào đó.
other.chloroformdsc: Chloroform. Một chất lỏng dễ bay hơi, không màu, thơm, đặc, được sản xuất trên quy mô lớn như một tiền chất của chất làm lạnh và Teflon. Trong thực tế, nó rất hữu ích để gây bất tỉnh.
other.mercurydsc: Kim loại lỏng. Tốt cho việc chăm sóc da, nhưng không tốt cho các chức năng sinh lý của cơ thể.
other.ketchupdsc: Sốt cà chua, vị chua ngọt, khá khó uống.
other.powderedmilkdsc: Sữa bột cô đặc được làm khô và nén chặt. Không thể ăn, nhưng có thể dùng để pha sữa với nước nóng.
other.morphinedsc: Thuốc phiện dòng mạnh dùng để giảm đau. Kém hiệu quả hơn khi uống trực tiếp.
other.opiumdsc: Thuốc phiện dòng nhẹ dùng để giảm đau. Kém hiệu quả hơn khi uống trực tiếp.
other.heroindsc: Thuốc phiện dòng rất mạnh dùng để giảm đau. Bạn không biết nhiều về thứ này.
other.naloxonedsc: Chất kháng thuốc phiện dùng để trị sốc thuốc. Điều trị kịp thời sẽ cứu được cái mạng của bạn.
other.fentanyldsc: Thuốc phiện dòng cực mạnh, mạnh gấp 100 lần Morphine. Cân nhắc pha loãng trước khi dùng.
other.ceftriaxonedsc: Kháng sinh Cephalosporin thế hệ thứ 3 dùng để trị nhiễm trùng. Giúp tăng miễn dịch trong một khoảng thời gian, nhưng gây đau đớn.
other.reliefcreamdsc: Hỗn hợp các hóa chất và thuốc. Giúp giảm đau tức thì và khử trùng vết thương.
other.woundgluedsc: Một chất cầm máu, kháng khuẩn dạng keo. Chống nhiễm trùng, thúc đẩy quá trình lành vết thương và rất hiệu quả trong việc bịt kín các vết thương đang chảy máu. Có thể gây ra các vấn đề về tuần hoàn máu. Cần sử dụng thận trọng.
other.keratinboosterdsc: Một loại hormone tăng trưởng dùng để kích thích sản xuất keratin. Giúp móng vuốt mọc lại nhanh hơn trong một khoảng thời gian.
other.highgradestimulantdsc: Nó mang lại cảm giác hưng phấn mạnh mẽ kéo dài, và nhìn chung là an toàn khi sử dụng. Quá liều thường gây suy yếu, với triệu chứng suy nhược nhẹ sau đó. Liều dùng là 100ml.
other.midgradestimulantdsc: Một loại thuốc kích thích mạnh, được tinh chế khá tốt. Chỉ có tác dụng khi tiêm tĩnh mạch. Mang lại cảm giác hưng phấn mạnh mẽ trong thời gian ngắn, nhưng có một vài tác dụng phụ. Quá liều dẫn đến suy yếu và chảy máu nội tạng. Liều dùng là 50ml.
other.lowgradestimulant: Chất kích thích không rõ nguồn gốc
other.lowgradestimulantdsc: Thuốc kích thích mạnh, chưa qua tinh chế. Nguy hiểm. Mang lại cảm giác hưng phấn khá tốt, nhưng hậu quả sẽ cực kỳ nghiêm trọng, kể cả quá liều. Liều lượng chưa được xác định. Hãy sử dụng thận trọng.
other.naltrexonedsc: Dùng để trị các bệnh thông thường như buồn nôn hoặc lạm dụng thuốc phiện. Giảm cảm giác hạnh phúc và có thể gây nôn mửa.
other.painkillersdsc: Painkillers dạng viên nén dùng để giảm đau. Liều tối đa cho phép là dưới 60ml.
other.disinfectantdsc: Chất sát trùng cơ bản. Chống nhiễm trùng và gây cảm giác hơi rát.
other.ringersolutiondsc: Dung dịch muối khoáng đẳng trương. Nó tương thích với dịch cơ thể và có hiệu quả cao khi bạn bị mất nước hoặc mất máu.
other.salinedsc: Hỗn hợp muối và nước, thường được dùng để trị chứng giảm thể tích máu và khát nước.
other.antivenomdsc: Hỗn hợp bao gồm các kháng thể vô hiệu hóa độc tố gây hại cho máu, được dùng bằng cách tiêm vào tĩnh mạch.
other.blooddsc: Máu màu vàng, dùng để trị chứng giảm thể tích máu. Màu của nó có vẻ bình thường đối với bạn, nhưng lại là tác dụng phụ của quá trình biến đổi sinh học.
other.redblooddsc: Máu màu đỏ, có thể dùng để trị chứng giảm thể tích máu, nhưng cơ thể sẽ không dung nạp tốt. Nó trông thật kì lạ đối với bạn và có mùi gợi nhớ đến những kẻ giam giữ bạn.
other.alienblooddsc: Máu màu vàng của sinh vật trên ngoại hành tinh này. Nhìn khá tương đồng với máu của bạn, những vẫn có thể nhìn thấy được một vài điểm khác biệt nhỏ. Lấy để thế máu chắc cũng không tệ lắm đâu.
other.antiserumdsc: Huyết thanh chứa kháng thể giúp chống lại hầu hết các bệnh nhiễm trùng thông thường. Tăng cường hệ miễn dịch và giúp giảm nguy cơ nhiễm trùng huyết. Làm tăng nhẹ thể tích máu.
other.antibioticsdsc: Thuốc viên giúp tăng cường hệ miễn dịch trong một khoảng thời gian, và chống lại mọi loại nhiễm trùng. Vị rất tệ.
other.sleepingpillsdsc: Thuốc ngủ hoạt tính mạnh. Giúp bạn ngủ ngon ngay cả khi tình trạng không tốt. Không được dùng chung với thuốc phiện.
other.procoagulantdsc: Chất hóa học thúc đẩy quá trình đông máu. Làm chậm quá trình mất máu trên toàn cơ thể, kể cả xuất huyết nội. Có thể gây biến chứng nếu sử dụng quá liều.
other.epinephrinedsc: Adrenaline nguyên chất. Giảm đau trong một khoảng thời gian và có khả năng nhỏ làm tim đập trở lại nếu nó ngừng đập. Dùng liều quá 40ml sẽ gây rung tim.
other.oxylinedsc: Thuốc thử tổng hợp có tác dụng nhanh chóng cung cấp oxy cho máu khi tiêm, đồng thời ổn định rung tim và thúc đẩy sản sinh hemoglobin. Có xu hướng gây nổ khi trộn với axit dạ dày.
other.antidepressantsdsc: Thuốc chống trầm cảm hoạt tính mạnh. Giúp bạn cảm nhận mọi thứ nhẹ nhàng hơn trong một khoảng thời gian, và dần dần tăng cảm giác hạnh phúc. Có thể có tác dụng phụ.
other.antiraddsc: Thuốc thử nghiệm này có tác dụng trực tiếp làm giảm các triệu chứng của bệnh nhiễm phóng xạ. Sẽ cần liều lượng cao trong trường hợp nặng.
other.braingrowdsc: Thuốc uống đặc trị có tác dụng kích thích tái tạo não. Giúp tăng cường chức năng não bộ, nhưng thường gây ra các tác dụng phụ nghiêm trọng.
other.mindwipedsc: Thuốc tổng hợp đặc biệt giúp xóa sạch hầu hết ký ức và tổn thương trong quá khứ, chỉ để lại bản năng sinh tồn, kiến thức cơ bản và sự vô cảm. Thường là giải pháp cuối khi đối tượng mất nhận thức hoặc có nguy cơ tự sát. Có thể chữa tổn thương não với mức độ từ trung bình đến nặng. Gây ra tác dụng vĩnh viễn nếu không được phục hồi dài hạn. Đây được coi là biện pháp cuối cùng.
other.streptokinasedsc: Enzyme tiêu sợi huyết được dùng để làm giảm mạnh độ nhớt của máu và làm tan máu đông.
other.sodiumnitroprussidedsc: Sodium nitroprusside. Dùng để hạ huyết áp, tránh tăng huyết áp cấp tính. Chỉ có tác dụng khi tiêm vào tĩnh mạch. Lưu lượng là 10ml/phút.
other.vasopressindsc: Loại hormone dùng để tăng huyết áp, tránh hạ huyết áp gây tử vong. Hiệu quả hơn khi tiêm vào tĩnh mạch. Lưu lượng là 10ml/phút.
other.amiodaronedsc: Chất chống loạn nhịp tim dùng để điều trị và ngăn ngừa rung tim. Nó sẽ làm cho hầu hết các rối loạn nhịp tim thoái lui dần, nhưng gây tổn thương nhẹ trong cơ thể. Chỉ có tác dụng khi tiêm vào tĩnh mạch. Lưu lượng là 20ml/phút.
other.chocolatemilkdsc: Một loại sữa được trộn với bột ca cao. Rất ngọt và ngon, nhưng độc hại đối với loài của bạn. Làm tăng cảm giác hạnh phúc. Cân nhắc trước khi uống.
other.icedteadsc: Trà lạnh, ngọt, không chứa caffeine. Thật ngon!
other.soupdsc: Không thể xác định được loại súp, nhưng vẫn ngon và no bụng.
other.cerealdsc: Phát minh vĩ đại nhất thế giới - sữa và ngũ cốc. Rất ngon và no bụng.
other.coffeedsc: Thức uống được pha từ hạt cà phê rang. Uống ngon và kích thích, nhưng không tốt do hàm lượng caffeine khá cao.
other.biochemdsc: Hợp chất hóa học tiên tiến là chất xúc tác mạnh mẽ cho các phản ứng hóa học và có thể kết dính một số vật liệu lại với nhau, hoặc thậm chí làm tan chảy chúng. Thường được sử dụng trong chế tạo.
other.groundwaterdsc: Nguồn nước này khá bẩn và có thể gây buồn nôn, nhưng hầu hết vẫn khá an toàn để uống.
other.waterdsc: Nước ngầm, khá bẩn và có thể gây buồn nôn, nhưng hầu hết vẫn khá an toàn để uống.
other.dirtywaterdsc: Ít ra thì bạn đã được tắm sạch. Đừng uống.
other.algaedsc: Nước chứa dày đặc các tảo phát quang sinh học. Bạn dễ dàng nổi trên nó, nhưng đừng bỏ vào miệng.
other.magmadsc: Đá nóng chảy. Bản năng mách bảo bạn tuyệt đối không được lại gần.
other.oildsc: Một loại dầu đen, đặc quánh. Bạn sẽ phải chật vật để di chuyển nếu lỡ rơi vào. Đừng có mà nuốt thứ này.
other.sapdsc: Một loại nhựa đặc, ngon, được tiết ra từ cây trong rừng. Rất ngọt.
other.fatdsc: Mỡ động vật dạng lỏng, thu được từ thịt. Có thể uống được, mặc dù không ngon lắm. Có thể chế biến thành xà phòng.
other.soapdsc: Xà phòng làm từ mỡ động vật. Dùng để làm sạch cơ thể và khử khuẩn nhẹ lên vết thương trong bảng tình trạng. Đừng nghĩ là bạn vẫn còn có thể uống được nó.
other.producejuicedsc: Hỗn hợp được ép và hòa trộn từ những nguyên liệu chay mà bạn tìm được. Vị của nó... thật mới lạ.
other.refinedjuicedsc: Nước ép này tốt hơn so với lúc chưa nấu. Rất ngon và bổ dưỡng!
other.Head: Đầu
other.experimenttraderdsc:
Một sinh vật kỳ dị, hình người với chiều cao khiêm tốn, lai giữa chó và chuột, có 3 phần lông mềm mại nhô ra phía sau đầu. Hình dạng hộp sọ giống các loài gặm nhấm.

Chúng khá vụng về và không có đặc điểm nổi bật cụ thể nào trong việc trao đổi, mua bán.

Chúng khá thoải mái với việc ôm.
other.milkytraderdsc:
Một sinh vật nhỏ nhắn có bộ lông trắng xù mềm mại, mõm ngắn, gần như phẳng và những chiếc sừng nhỏ màu trắng mọc trên đầu. Dường như có thể sống dưới nước ở một mức độ nào đó, do chúng có cặp vây trên lưng.

Chúng có vẻ khá thông minh và hơi kêu ngạo, có thể sở hữu một vài loại vũ khí để bù đắp cho thể lực kém.

Chúng không quá hứng thú với việc đụng chạm thân mật, nên là bạn cần tạo thiện cảm nhiều hơn nữa để được ôm.
other.dunetraderdsc:
Cao to, vạm vỡ, nhưng não ngắn. Chúng có những chiếc vây kì lạ rải rác khắp cơ thể, 6 rai nhọn mọc ở 2 bên đầu và một bộ hàm lớn với những chiếc răng to sắc nhọn, trông thật kinh hãi. Có vẻ như chúng có mang quanh thân.

Chúng không tự nhiên tỏ ra hung hăng, mà là do đói, vì thế chúng có thể sẽ không để ý đến những đồ lặt vặt mà bạn đưa cho chúng; Bạn cần tìm cách tốt hơn để lấy lòng chúng.
other.clicktocontinue:
Nhấp chuột để tiếp tục...
[ESC] để bỏ qua
other.favouriteditem: Những vật phẩm được đánh dấu sẽ không được dùng để chế tạo
other.startrundsc: Leo xuống những cái hang bên dưới.
other.presetnormaldsc: Trải nghiệm mặc định. Mọi sai lầm đều sẽ phải trả giá. Tri thức và khả năng nhận thức tình huống sẽ được đền đáp xứng đáng. Thời gian là vàng. Cái chết là điều chắc chắn.
other.presetrelaxeddsc: Chuyến leo xuống nhẹ nhàng và chậm rãi hơn. Mắc sai lầm thì vẫn phải trả giá, nhưng dễ dàng né tránh hơn. Bạn có thêm thời gian để khám phá và xem xét xung quanh.
other.presetparadisedsc: Những cái hang này rõ ràng tốt hơn cái phòng thí nghiệm đó. Sai lầm ít phải trả giá hơn nhiều, vật phẩm và những người thân thiện ở khắp mọi nơi. Các mối nguy hiểm và áp lực thời gian không còn là vấn đề lớn.
other.presetdesolatedsc: Một mình trong bóng tối. Nguy hiểm luôn rình rập xung quanh, trong khi chẳng có gì nhiều để tìm. Hiếm khi gặp được ai khác, nhưng một khi gặp được thì sẽ có rất nhiều điều để chia sẻ với họ.
other.presetunchippeddsc: Không còn bị gò bó trong một khoảng thời gian ít ỏi như những cá thể gắn chip, nhưng tự chẩn đoán sẽ trở thành vấn đề nan giải. Sau tất cả thì điều này sẽ xứng đáng, có lẻ vậy?
other.presetendlessdsc:
Không còn lối thoát; Cái chết đã được định đoạt. Bạn có thể chịu đựng được trong bao lâu, khi mà các mối nguy hiểm ngày càng tăng?

[LƯU Ý: Không khả dụng trong giai đoạn này, vì game chưa có phần kết]
other.runsettingsdsc: Chọn một trong những kiểu chơi bên dưới. Bạn có thể điều chỉnh trong bảng tùy chỉnh bên phải.
other.runsetunchippeddsc: Vô hiệu hóa hầu hết mọi thứ trong bảng tình trạng, tự chuẩn đoán trở thành bài toán khó. Tầm nhìn thu hẹp trong vùng quan sát được.
other.runsetbaselootdensitydsc: Lượng vật phẩm, như là buồng chứa, khoang cứu sinh, thùng chứa, được phân bổ trong một tầng.
other.runsetlootmultiplierdsc:
Lượng vật phẩm còn lại sau khi giảm theo cấp số nhân ở mỗi tầng.

Nói cách khác, mật độ vật phẩm ở 2 tầng kế nhau tạo thành một cấp số nhân với công bội là thông số được thiết lập.
other.runsetbasetrapdensitydsc: Lượng mối nguy hiểm, như là bẫy cơ khí, sinh vật thù địch, những mối nguy hiểm khác, được phân bổ trong một tằng.
other.runsettrapincreasedsc:
Lượng mối nguy hiểm sau khi tăng theo cấp số cộng ở mỗi tằng.

Nói cách khác, mật độ nguy hiểm ở 2 tầng kế nhau tạo thành cấp số cộng với công sai là thông số được thiết lập.
other.runsettimelimitdsc: Bạn được phép ở đây trong bao nhiêu đó phút.
other.runsetstartingsuppliesdsc: Thứ mà bạn được phát lúc đầu.
other.runsetxpgaindsc: Lượng kinh nghiệm mà bạn có thể nhận được mỗi lần.
other.runsetmetabolismratedsc: Tốc độ đói/khát/hết buồn nôn/giảm cân.
other.runsethealingratedsc: Tốc độ tái tạo, phục hồi khi bị thương như là mất máu, gãy xương, trật khớp và tổn thương cơ/da/não, hay là đông máu.
other.runsetfracturepain: Mức độ đau do chấn thương ở xương
other.runsetfracturepaindsc: Mức độ cơn đau phải chịu đựng khi bị trật khớp/gãy xương.
other.runsetbleedratedsc: Tốc độ thể tích máu giảm do chảy máu.
other.runsetinfectionspeeddsc: Tốc độ biến thiên của tình trạng nhiễm trùng, tốc độ diệt khuẩn, cũng như là thuốc sát trùng có hiệu lực trong bao lâu.
other.runsetinfectionchancedsc: Tỷ lệ vết thương bị nhiễm trùng.
other.runsetfibrillationrate: Tốc độ tiến triển rung tim
other.runsetfibrillationratedsc: Tốc độ tiến triển của tình trạng rung tim. Nó tỉ lệ nghịch với thời gian còn lại trước khi chết.
other.runsetbonuslimbarmordsc:
Lượng sát thương nhận được còn lại sau khi giảm, chỉ còn bằng 2^(1-n) ban đầu, với n là thông số được thiết lập.

Nó cách khác, cứ mỗi lần tăng thông số thêm một, thì lượng sát thương nhận được giảm còn phân nửa.
other.runsetstaminaregendsc: Tốc độ hồi phục sức lực.
other.runsetattackdamagedsc: Lượng sát thương gây ra khi bạn tấn công.
other.runsetstrokesdsc: Cho phép bị đột quỵ khi bị tăng huyết áp cấp tính.
other.runsetbraindamagefxdsc: Cho phép bị động kinh theo đợt do tổn thương não gây ra.
other.runsetinfinitelaststanddsc: Cho phép bạn có khả năng sống lại nhiều hơn 1 lần.
other.runsetmoodnormalizationrate: Tốc độ ổn định tâm trạng
other.runsetmoodnormalizationratedsc: Tốc độ trở về mức 0 của thông số tâm trạng. Thông số được thiết lập càng cao thì càng khó để kéo dài niềm vui/nỗi buồn.
other.runsetforcesleepdsc: Cho phép tự động bất tỉnh khi mức độ tỉnh táo bằng 0.
other.runsetlowmoodeventsdsc: Cho phép tự gây thương tích lên bản thân khi tâm trạng đi xuống cực kỳ thấp.
other.runsetliquidpushingdsc: Cho phép dòng chảy chất lỏng có thể cuốn bạn và các vật thể theo.
other.runsetdisfigurementdsc: Cho phép khuôn mặt nhân vật có thể vĩnh viễn mất đi những bộ phận.
other.runsetsleepcyclespeeddsc: Tốc độ trải qua quá trình thức/ngủ.
other.runsetencumbrancecapdsc: Lượng tải trọng tối đa mang trên người trước khi bị quá tải.
other.runsetnosleeprestrictionsdsc: Cho phép ngủ tùy thích, kể cả khi nhân vật đang còn tỉnh táo/bồn nôn/bị đau/...
other.runsettraderchancedsc: Tỉ lệ xuất hiện người sống sót trong khoang cứu sinh.
other.runsettraderitemamountdsc: Lượng vật phẩm dùng để trao đổi, mua bán của người sống sót.
other.runsettraderrepoffsetdsc: Lượng thiện cảm thêm vào/bớt ra khi lần đầu gặp mặt.
other.runsetitemdecayratedsc: Tốc độ hết hạn sử dụng của những món đồ như thức ăn, túi, nguồn sáng.
other.runsetlayermodifierchancedsc: Khả năng một khu vực xuất hiện với một đặc điểm bất thường.
